name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by
  cases b <;> rfl

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) (s : Finset α) : (s.powerset).card = 2 ^ s.card := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset]

name: exp_monotone
nat_strong_induction
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop) (h0 : P 0) (h1 : ∀ n, (∀ m, m < n → P m) → P n) : ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind n ih =>
    cases n with
    | zero => exact h0
    | succ n =>
      apply h1
      intro m hm
      apply ih m hm

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement {α : Type*} (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type*} (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le {α β : Type*} [DecidableEq β] (s : Finset α) (f : α → β) :
    s.card ≥ (s.image f).card := by
  apply Finset.card_image_le

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 2 ^ n > 0 := by
  positivity

name: de_morgan_not_and

import Mathlib

theorem de_morgan_not_and (P Q : Prop) : (¬ (P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬ P ∨ ¬ Q)) :=
  not_and_or

name: pow_two_ge_one
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_two_ge_one (n : ℕ) : 2 ^ n ≥ 1 := by
  apply Nat.one_le_pow
  exact Nat.zero_lt_two

name: nat_strong_induction
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop) (h0 : P 0) (h1 : ∀ n, (∀ m, m < n → P m) → P n) : ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind n ih => exact h1 n (fun m hm => ih m hm)

name: nat_pow_pos

import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 2 ^ n > 0 := by
  positivity

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by

name: injective_card_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  have : Fintype.card (Fin n) ≤ Fintype.card (Fin m) :=
    Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf
  simpa [Fintype.card_fin] using this

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type*} (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  exact Nat.add_comm a b

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict {α β γ : Type*} [LinearOrder α] [LinearOrder β] [LinearOrder γ]
  (f : β → γ) (g : α → β) (h : StrictMono f) (h' : StrictMono g) :
  StrictMono (f ∘ g) :=
StrictMono.comp h h'

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement {α : Type*} (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) (s : Finset ℕ) (hs : s.card = n) : (s.powerset).card = 2 ^ n := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset, hs]

name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le {α β : Type*} [DecidableEq β] (s : Finset α) (f : α → β) :
    (s.image f).card ≤ s.card :=
  Finset.card_image_le

name: injective_card_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  have : Fintype.card (Fin n) ≤ Fintype.card (Fin m) :=
    Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf
  simpa [Fintype.card_fin] using this

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict {α β γ : Type*} [LinearOrder α] [LinearOrder β] [LinearOrder γ]
  (f : β → γ) (g : α → β) (h : StrictMono f) (h' : StrictMono g) :
  StrictMono (f ∘ g) := by
  apply StrictMono.comp h h'

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset (α : Type*) (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s :=
  Set.empty_subset s

-- The proof is complete as the lemma Set.empty_subset directly proves the statement.
-- No additional proof is required beyond invoking the correct Mathlib lemma.

name: de_morgan_not_and

theorem de_morgan_not_and (P Q : Prop) : 
  ¬(P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬P ∨ ¬Q) := 
by apply not_and_or

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  have := Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf
  simpa [Fintype.card_fin] using this

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by
